options.prompt:
[feature-xstate-drop-prompt]

Project: Script Kit GPUI. We are iterating through feature-map/ and evolving feature_explorer/ into an XState-driven wireframe/mockup atlas. Repository rules: update lat.md/ when behavior/docs/contracts change and run lat check. For this Oracle pass, use the attached packx bundle and return text only.

Task: produce an implementation-ready authored XState runtime machine plan for Feature 020: Drop Prompt / drop(). Focus on SDK no-arg drop(), FileInfo return shape, Message::Drop -> ShowDrop -> AppView::DropPrompt, FocusTarget::DropPrompt, DivPrompt sizing, empty Submit disabled with actionDisabled:"no_files", DropPrompt::submit empty guard, files-present submit JSON metadata, Escape cancel/null, getState/getElements/getLayoutInfo receipts, active footer identity, OS drop event wiring gap around DropPrompt::handle_drop, Actions/Cmd+K affordance gap, ForceSubmit gap, adjacent ACP/chat drop and File Search drag boundaries, privacy/path exposure, file size precision, directory/non-file/deleted-before-submit edge cases.

Return:
1. Concrete XState states and transitions suitable for feature_explorer/src/state/authoredFeatureMachines.ts.
2. Wireframe metadata guidance for each major state, using existing FeatureWireframeMeta style and avoiding unsupported enum values.
3. Invariants/regression states that should be represented.
4. Any discrepancies between Feature 020 chapter and attached source that should be corrected before/while authoring.
5. Verification checklist for this feature explorer iteration.

Do not edit files. Do not summarize generically; give direct implementation guidance.
